The commentator adds that what Varahamihira has given
here is a general definition and description of houses and doors, but
other writers on this subject have mentioned eight House-Gods and
their asterisms as well as those of the 32 doors. According to them
houses and doors should be constructed on the basis of the strength
of the Moon and the asterism (of the deities and doors) known as
q?^T and ciRRH. They speak of eight deities of houses thus :
qmt HS scHGcfl OTT qRgqxr 5^:11
